repo.description: Collection of scripts to aggregate image data for the purposes of training an NSFW Image Classifier

terms.context_snippet: This is a set of scripts that allows for an automatic collection of _tens of thousands_ of images for the following (loosely defined) categories to be later used for training an image classifier:
